# Biolog

> Multimodal AI reasoning chain visualization demo. Shows how adding a meal photo changes LLM inference structure and confidence (63% → 84% in recorded sample).

## What is Biolog?

Biolog is an open-source web demo (React + FastAPI) that visualizes:
- Streaming AI reasoning steps (SSE token stream)
- Counterfactual comparison: same symptom with vs without food photo
- Photo region annotations on meal images
- 5 LLM providers: OpenAI, Kimi, SiliconFlow, DeepSeek, custom endpoints

## Key facts

- Repository: https://github.com/jaychouya/biolog
- Language: Chinese UI, English-friendly README
- License: see repository
- Not a medical product — lifestyle correlation exploration only
- Demo mode works without API key

## Quick start

```bash
cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --port 8000
cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
```

## Deep links

- Compare experiment: `/?view=compare`
- Demo scenarios: `/?mode=demo`
- AI mode: `/?mode=ai`

## API

- POST /analyze/stream — SSE streaming analysis
- GET /providers — supported LLM providers
